creator: c.sudharsan1988@gmail.com
text:
# Host system files in /tmp directory

root@u32-rel-bld20:/usr/ports/sysutils/docker-freebsd # ls /tmp/
.ICE-unix		.XIM-unix		go-build282742742	go-build391252752	go-build675142412	ou1			phoebe-docker1.tgz	tmp
.X11-unix		.font-unix		go-build335074337	go-build649367855	go-build797393811	out			test


#Trying to mount /tmp volume from host inside container /tmp folder

root@u32-rel-bld20:/usr/ports/sysutils/docker-freebsd # docker run -ti --cap-add SYS_RAWIO -v /tmp:/tmp -v /dev/mem:/dev/mem --privileged phoebe:11.8.6-070 /bin/sh

#Couldnt find the content of host /tmp directory content
# ls /tmp/
.s.PGSQL.5432.lock	hsperfdata_root		raid_status		raid_type
#
